channel.title: Beyond Dying Skies Patch Updates
channel.description: List of patch updates for Beyond Dying Skies

item.title: Build 0.1.304-308 Released
item.description: Added CHANGElog.md to the project. Changed physics spatial database to octree from grid. Removed bundled GLEW library and set makefile to link with system GLEW. Optimized ray and grid traversals in MGL and updated function signatures for compatibility.

item.title: Build 0.1.297-304 Released
item.description: Optimized application launch code. Fixed ray bug on physics entities. Reworked stats and stat attributes. Refactors to minimize particle bloat. Fixed UI hover bug. Window opens after loading game to minimize boring load times.

item.title: Build 0.1.285-297 Released
item.description: Added dynamic linking to MGL lib in default build. Added precompiled headers to build. Greatly increased robustness of makefiles. Removed all warnings and errors on clang-6++ and g++. Fixed double jump bugs. Hunting down bugs and undefined behavior.

item.title: Build 0.1.280-284 Released
item.description: Fixed compilation on clang-3.5. Fixed compilation on clang-6. Ran UBSAN on code and fixed undefined behavior.

item.title: Build 0.1.276-279 Released
item.description: Created new game mode: Creative. Created ability to select game type from title menu. Title menu allows creating new games, loading games and deleting games from GUI.

item.title: Build 0.1.273-275 Released
item.description: Added game menu at title screen. Added new game and load game options in title menu. Fixed drone pathing bug and title screen saving bug.
